activities_projects.title: Preamble Reading Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the Preamble of the Constitution
steps: Read the Preamble of the Indian Constitution from the textbook
Underline important words like justice, liberty, equality
Write the meaning of each word in simple sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the basic values of the Constitution

activities_projects.title: Fundamental Rights Chart
activities_projects.objective: Identify the Fundamental Rights in the Constitution
steps: Write the names of the Fundamental Rights
Add one example for each right
Decorate and display the chart in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises basic rights given to citizens

activities_projects.title: Why Do We Need a Constitution?
activities_projects.objective: Understand the need for a Constitution
steps: Write three reasons why a country needs a Constitution
Discuss how rules help maintain order
Write a short paragraph explaining your ideas
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the purpose of the Constitution

activities_projects.title: Classroom Rules Activity
activities_projects.objective: Relate constitutional rules to everyday life
steps: List five rules that should be followed in your classroom
Explain why each rule is important
Discuss how rules help everyone
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of rules in society

activities_projects.title: Identify Constitutional Values
activities_projects.objective: Recognise values such as equality and justice
steps: Write the values mentioned in the Preamble
Give a simple example for each value
Explain how these values apply in daily life

activities_projects.title: Freedom and Equality Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of freedom and equality
steps: Discuss what freedom means to you
Write two examples of equality in school
Explain why both are important in a democracy

activities_projects.title: Rights and Duties List
activities_projects.objective: Understand the relationship between rights and responsibilities
steps: Write three rights students have in school
Write one duty related to each right
Explain why duties are important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands balance between rights and duties
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct matching of rights and duties (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Constitution Word Search
activities_projects.objective: Learn important terms related to the Constitution
steps: Write words like constitution, rights, equality, justice
Find their meanings in the textbook
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Poster on Equality
steps: Draw a poster showing people treated equally
Add a short slogan about equality
Explain your poster to the class

activities_projects.title: Short Essay on the Constitution
activities_projects.objective: Summarise what students learned about the Constitution
steps: Write a short paragraph about the Indian Constitution
Mention its purpose and importance
Include at least one example of a right
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of the Constitution
